steps.title: Identify the doubling factor
steps.content: The model is $$f(t)=75{,}000\cdot2^{t/380}$$ The starting population is $75{,}000$, and the factor $2^{t/380}$ shows the growth multiplier.

steps.title: Set the multiplier to 2
steps.content: For the population to double, the multiplier must be $2$: $$2^{t/380}=2^1$$ Therefore $$\frac{t}{380}=1$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: Since $\frac{t}{380}=1$, multiply by $380$ to get $t=380$. The population doubles after 380 minutes.
